summary: GCA external review status is centralized here so wallets, data platforms, reviewers, and community moderators can separate completed verification from pending external review and deferred actions.

doNotClaim: BaseScan token profile approval before publication
security-vendor approval, permanent warning-free status, or cross-wallet warning removal before vendor/current wallet UI confirms it
CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap listing before publication
locked reserve before on-chain custody changes
external audit completion before an independent report is published
deep liquidity, price support, return promises, or ranking acceptance
nextActions: Use the Chinese owner flow at https://gcagochina.com/zh-basescan-submit.html and the BaseScan Handoff copy blocks at https://gcagochina.com/basescan-handoff.html, keep support@gcagochina.com active, retain the activation evidence packet privately, rerun the final preflight, and submit one clean BaseScan update from the official domain mailbox.

If there is still no BaseScan reply after the clean support@gcagochina.com submission, use https://gcagochina.com/basescan-followup.html or https://gcagochina.com/zh-basescan-followup.html to reply inside the existing ticket instead of opening duplicate token-profile submissions.

Include the published Tim Chen professional profile URL https://gcagochina.com/tim-chen.html in the next BaseScan submission; add LinkedIn later if BaseScan specifically requires a third-party social-network profile.
Use the expanded BaseScan reply template at https://gcagochina.com/platform-replies.html after the project-domain email is active, or earlier only if BaseScan specifically asks for more information.
Keep monitoring wallet-warning UI before claiming any broader warning-free or security-vendor approval status.
Keep GCA/USDT market links, logo, whitepaper, Telegram, X, and metadata files live.
Use the risk-remediation plan when a reviewer asks how volatility, LP custody, supply concentration, or audit status will be reduced.
Use the custody roadmap when a reviewer asks what evidence would be required before reserve multisig, reserve lock, vesting, or LP-lock claims.
Use listing-readiness and market-quality pages before CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap submission.
Revisit third-party audit only when partner, listing, trust, or liquidity requirements justify it.
